steps.title: Locate the definition
steps.content: The question asks what someone who professionally evaluates books is called. The passage directly defines literary critics as people whose job it is to evaluate books.

steps.title: Separate book roles
steps.content: Choice A names someone who writes books, Choice B names someone involved in publishing them, and Choice C names someone who sells them. The role defined as evaluating books is a literary critic. The answer is D.
